MarketingLanding.safetyEyebrow: For solo travelers · Solo traveler safety
MarketingLanding.safetyTitle: Designed by women, for women traveling alone.
MarketingLanding.safetyBody: Every salon partner is verified for safety, accessibility, and English-speaking staff. Booking quietly, walking in confidently — that's the whole point.

MarketingLanding.b2bEyebrow: For salon owners · For business owners
MarketingLanding.b2bTitle: Get foreign clients without speaking their language.
MarketingLanding.b2bBody: Hesya translates messages, manages bookings, and handles cross-border payments. You focus on the cut. We handle the chat.
MarketingLanding.trendingTitle: What foreign travelers are actually booking this week.
MarketingLanding.trendingSub: Tap a chip to filter the salons that nail it.

faqItems.q: Do salon staff actually speak English / Japanese / Chinese?
faqItems.a: 92% of K-Verified salons have at least one staff member fluent in English. Japanese, Chinese (simplified + traditional), and Vietnamese support is available via the in-app translator — auto-detects your language and routes messages live, both ways.

faqItems.q: What if my AI style match says 'not advised'?
faqItems.a: We tell you why — hair texture, scalp condition, or technique mismatch — and suggest 3 alternative looks that work for your features. No surprises after you arrive.
Pay in your local currency (JPY, CNY, USD, VND, etc.). We handle currency conversion and settle to the salon in KRW. No hidden fees — the price you see is the price you pay.
Free cancellation up to 24 hours before. We auto-translate the cancellation message so the salon never gets confused about why you canceled.

faqItems.q: Is it really safe for solo women?
faqItems.a: All partner salons are verified for location (≤ 5 min from subway), staff composition (92% have female stylists on staff), and 24/7 human-moderated chat support is available in your language — not bots.

faqItems.q: Do you have a salon I can recommend?
faqItems.a: Yes — refer them at hesya.com/refer. We give you ₩50,000 credit when they're onboarded as a K-Verified partner.

MarketingLanding.finalCtaTravelerBody: Find K-Verified salons in your language. Free to use, free to cancel up to 24 hours before.
MarketingLanding.finalCtaOwnerBody: Get foreign clients without language anxiety. Free until your first booking.
MarketingLanding.finalCtaTrust: ISO 27001 certified · GDPR compliant · K-PIPL compliant · PCI DSS Level 1

allergy.title: Treatment safety information
allergy.allergyBody: Color services contain PPD-free dyes. Patch test recommended 48h prior for first-time visitors. Notify staff of any prior allergic reactions to hair products.
allergy.aftercareBody: 48h: avoid washing. Use sulfate-free shampoo. Heat ≤ 150°C for 2 weeks. Free aftercare consultation in your language for 30 days.
allergy.footerNote: First time? Discuss with stylist before treatment.
